symbols.name: SqlServerIdempotentMigrationsSqlGenerator
symbols.summary: A custom SQL Server Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Migrations.MigrationsSqlGenerator that emits idempotent DDL statements. This generator wraps CREATE and DROP statements for tables, indexes, sequences, and constraints in IF EXISTS / IF NOT EXISTS guards, preventing errors when schema objects already exist or have been removed. It allows repeated or parallel migration executions to remain resilient.
